headline: Assessing Evergy (EVRG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Growth Expectations
summary: Evergy stock set against recent performance and fundamentals Evergy (EVRG) has drawn investor attention after a recent close of $82.73, with the stock showing a 1 day return of 2.15% and a past 3 months return of 7.79%. Alongside these moves, the company reports annual revenue of $6.03b and net income of $882.1m, with reported annual revenue growth of 6.19% and net income growth of 11.80%. These figures give investors concrete data points to assess the current valuation. See our latest...
